zh.Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ar: 法國哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內
zh.Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, F: 法國德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內
zh.Châtillon-sur-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne,: 法國哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri I. DE CHATILLON於1086年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內時，他的父親Wouter I de Chatillon36歲，母親Mathilde VAN LEUVEN43歲。他於1110年與Ermengarde DE MONTJAY在法國德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1135年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri I. DE CHATILLON于1086年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內a利-素-馬內时，他的父亲Wouter I de Chatillon36岁，母亲Mathilde VAN LEUVEN43岁。他于1110年与Ermengarde DE MONTJAY在法国德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1135年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri I. DE CHATILLON was born in 1086, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Wouter I de Chatillon, was 36 and his mother, Mathilde VAN LEUVEN, was 43. He married Ermengarde DE MONTJAY in 1110, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1135, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri I. DE CHATILLON est né en 1086, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Wouter I de Chatillon, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mathilde VAN LEUVEN, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde DE MONTJAY en 1110, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1135, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri I. DE CHATILLON 1086 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wouter I de Chatillon 36 und seine Mutter Mathilde VAN LEUVEN 43. Er hat 1110 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich Ermengarde DE MONTJAY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1135 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri I. DE CHATILLON è nato il nel 1086 nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Wouter I de Chatillon, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde VAN LEUVEN, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde DE MONTJAY nel 1110, nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1135, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri I. DE CHATILLONが1086年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Wouter I de Chatillonは36歳，母Mathilde VAN LEUVENは43歳であった。1110年にフランスグランド エストマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンでErmengarde DE MONTJAYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1135年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri I. DE CHATILLON(이)가 1086년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wouter I de Chatillon(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde VAN LEUVEN(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1110년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에서 Ermengarde DE MONTJAY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1135년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri I. DE CHATILLON nasceu em 1086, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Wouter I de Chatillon, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde VAN LEUVEN, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde DE MONTJAY em 1110, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1135, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri I. DE CHATILLON родился в 1086 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Wouter I de Chatillon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde VAN LEUVEN, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde DE MONTJAY в 1110 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, гранд эст, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1135 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri I. DE CHATILLON nació en 1086, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Wouter I de Chatillon, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mathilde VAN LEUVEN, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Ermengarde DE MONTJAY en 1110, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1135, a la edad de 49 años.
